sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see that pressing RIGHT moved the green squares! The green squares and the white squares inside them. The green squares and the white square inside them moved right by 3 columns.
Before:
- id=6 (left green): bnd=[[30, 18], [30, 20], [32, 20], [32, 18]
After:
- id=6 (left green): bnd=[[30, 21], [30, 23], [32, 23], [32, 21]
So the green square moved from col 18-20 to col 21-23. That's a shift of +3 columns.
Similarly, the middle green square:
Before:
- id=7 (middle green): bnd=[[30, 27], [30, 29], [32, 29], [32, 27]
After:
- id=8 (middle green): bnd=[[30, 27], [30, 29], [32, 29], [32, 27]
Wait, the middle green square stayed the same? Let me re-examine. Actually, the middle green square stayed at the same position. Let me re-examine. The middle green square stayed at the same position. Let me re-examine. The middle green square stayed at the same position. Let me re-examine.
Wait, the middle green square stayed at the same position. Let me re-examine.
Actually, looking at the boundaries:
- id=6 (left green): moved from [30, 18] to [30, 21] - shifted right by 3 columns.
- id=7 (middle green): stayed at [30, 27] to [30, 29] - stayed the same.
Wait, the middle green square stayed at [30, 27] to [30, 29] stayed the same.
But the white square inside it was adjacent to changed.
Let me look at the white square:
Before:
- id=8 (white square): bnd=[[30, 30], [30, 32], [32, 32], [32, 30]
After:
- id=9 (white square): bnd=[[30, 30], [30, 32], [32, 32], [32, 30]
The white square stayed at the same position.
So pressing RIGHT only moved the left green square right by 3 columns. The white pixel inside it also moved.
So the left green square and its white pixel moved right by 3 columns. The middle green square and its black pixel stayed in place.
This is interesting. So the green squares can move the left green square. Let me think about what the goal might be. The goal might be to move the green squares to specific positions.
Let me try pressing LEFT to see if it moves the left green square moves left by 3 columns.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try pressing LEFT to see if it moves the left green square back
action(['LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
